transcript.text: Hello, Bhavesh ji! Main Priya bol rahi hoon, Imagicaa Theme Park se. Aapne recently 12 April
Haan, Khopoli wala park hi hai. Kya aapko price ka issue lag raha tha?
Theek hai, maine aapko 10% discount apply kar diya hai. Ab total amount ₹4316 ho gaya hai. Maine aapko naya booking link bhej diya hai SMS pe. Aap check kar sakte hain?
Haan, but I am not available on that date.
Achcha, theek hai. Koi baat nahi. Aap kaun se date pe available rahenge? Hum uske hisaab se booking change kar sakte hain.
Koi baat nahi. Jab aap decide kar lein, toh bata dijiyega. Main aapko link bhej deti hoon, jab time mile check kar lena. Theek hai?
Theek hai, maine aapko link bhej diya hai. Jab aapko time mile, tab book kar lijiyega. Thank you!
You're welcome! Have a great day!
